replies.msg:
Black Lives Matter co-founder teams up with pro-Chinese Communist Party group
https://nypost.com/2020/09/17/blm-co-founder-teams-up-with-pro-chinese-communist-party-group/

Pro-China advocacy group funds project headed by Black Lives Matter co-founder: Black Futures Lab listed as 'fiscally funded project' of Chinese Progressive Association
https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2020/sep/16/pro-china-advocacy-group-funds-project-headed-blac/

Alicia Garza 成立咗新組織 Black Futures Lab，宗旨爲「gather information about the ways that policy affects black communities收集有關政策如何影響黑人羣體嘅情報」，背後由Chinese Progressive Association做金主，「fiscally sponsored project of the Chinese Progressive Association」。該組織與中共有關聯，2019曾經喺Boston嘅大會堂慶祝共產黨打贏中國，並會幫中國移民辦理證件renewal。

Alicia Garza更自稱爲 "trained Marxists"，受過培訓嘅馬克思主義者。
